_doc: Local VMware VulnHub lab registry. Edit the IPs after first boot. Targets with enabled=true are used by stage2/vm_lab.py for hosts rendering, health checks, and descriptor sync.

notes: Keep the target VMs off bridged/NAT while doing live testing.
Attach the attacker VM (for example Kali) to the same host-only segment.
Take a clean snapshot immediately after first successful boot.

targets.label: DC-1
targets.notes: Drupal web entry plus SUID find root. Good for restoring the host-level privesc layer missing from the Docker-only Drupal path.

targets.label: Raven-2
targets.notes: Web foothold to service/database privilege escalation. Keep it as the MySQL/UDF class VM.

targets.label: Toppo-1
targets.notes: Kept to match the original shortlist. Public write-ups usually classify the root step closer to SUID/GTFOBins than a clean sudo-only misconfiguration.

targets.label: Symfonos-1
targets.notes: Optional replacement for Toppo. Common write-ups treat it as a PATH-hijack/SUID style root path rather than a pure sudo GTFOBins box.
